title: Luminous Blocks
description: Luminous glass that emit light, perfect for underwater builds and for enhanced building aesthetics.
body: ## ✦ Community Showcase Here's a build shared by a member of the community, using Luminous Glass in a creative way: Got a cool build using Luminous Blocks? [Share it on Discord](https://discord.gg/UmwdJwAyAB)! ## ✦ Overview Luminous Blocks adds **glowing variants for every glass block** and their pane forms. They emit light when placed, making them ideal for glowing builds, ambient lighting, or underwater architecture. Compatible with beacon beams. `The icon overlay is to distinguish them from normal glass, this doesnt affect the placed blocks.` ## ✦ Crafting Recipes The Luminosity Wand allows you to right-click any Luminous Block to change the light level. Three light levels: **low** (5), **medium** (10), and **high** (15). `Stick + 1 Glowstone Dust → Luminosity Wand` ## Crafting is **shapeless**, and light level is the same no matter which ingredient is used. All Luminous Glass is crafted by combining any glass block with a light-emitting ingredient. `Glass + 1 Torch` ## `Glass + 1 Glowstone Block` ## `Glass + 4 Glowstone Dust` ## `Glass + 1 Sea Lantern` ## `Glass + 4 Prismarine Crystals` ## `6 Luminous Glass → 16 Luminous Panes` ## Shoutout to St0lasHB for playtesting all 1.3.0 versions!
